title: Kucoin - REKT
relevance_summary: Large-scale token theft via hot wallet access, followed by attempts to launder funds through decentralized exchanges.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers large sums of ERC20 tokens from known hot wallets.

red_flags: large-scale token transfer from known hot wallet
immediate sale of stolen tokens on decentralized exchanges
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers large sums of ERC20 tokens from known hot wallets.
summary: A hacker accessed Kucoin's hot wallet and stole over $280m worth of ERC20 tokens. They attempted to launder the funds through decentralized exchanges, causing price impacts on various tokens. A guard could have detected and blocked the large-scale token transfers from known hot wallets.
